top3.sql:
WITH cards_with_brazil_portuguese AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.isOnlineOnly
    FROM cards c
    INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese'
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards_with_brazil_portuguese;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese';

WITH cards_with_brazil_portuguese AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.isOnlineOnly
    FROM cards c
    INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese'
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards_with_brazil_portuguese;

WITH sets_with_brazil_portuguese AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT fd.uuid
    FROM foreign_data fd
    WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese'
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN sets_with_brazil_portuguese sbp ON c.uuid = sbp.uuid;

WITH cards_with_brazil_portuguese AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.isOnlineOnly
    FROM cards c
    INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese'
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards_with_brazil_portuguese;

WITH cards_with_brazil_portuguese AS (

    INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese'
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards_with_brazil_portuguese;

WITH sets_with_brazil_portuguese AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT fd.uuid
    FROM foreign_data fd
    WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese'
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN sets_with_brazil_portuguese sbp ON c.uuid = sbp.uuid;

WITH cards_with_brazil_portuguese AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.isOnlineOnly
    FROM cards c
    INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese'
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards_with_brazil_portuguese;

final.sql:
WITH cards_with_brazil_portuguese AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.isOnlineOnly
    FROM cards c
    INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Brazil Portuguese'
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards_with_brazil_portuguese;
